# Skill update

## Summary

<!-- Which skill changed and why? What's the user-visible effect? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `metadata.version` bumped in the skill's `SKILL.md` frontmatter.
- [ ] `VERSIONS.md` updated (version + last-updated date).
- [ ] Changes are consistent with the Dependency Rule and the rest of the skill.
- [ ] `validate-skills.sh` passes locally.
